Home By Sport

Custom Locker Rooms Built for Every Sport

by sport

Every sport has unique equipment needs. We design custom wood and melamine lockers optimized for your game—from football and hockey to basketball, baseball, and soccer. Choose your sport below or explore our full lineup.

Football Lockers Spacious, ventilated storage for helmets, pads, and cleats. Hockey Lockers Reinforced construction for heavy gear and equipment. Basketball Lockers Sleek design for shoes, uniforms, and personal items. Baseball Lockers Organized storage for bats, gloves, helmets, and uniforms. Soccer Lockers Compartments for cleats, shin guards, and team gear.

What's trending

  • Complete Guide to Custom Sports Lockers

  • College Athletic Locker Guide

Get a quote

Free design consultation for your locker room. 30+ years experience, 5 year warranty.

Request a quote

Football Lockers

Football equipment is bulky, heavy, and needs proper ventilation. Our football lockers are designed for helmets, pads, cleats, and uniforms while keeping everything organized and dry.

  • Spacious compartments for helmets and shoulder pads
  • Enhanced ventilation to prevent moisture buildup
  • Dedicated storage for cleats and footwear
  • Uniform hanging space and reinforced construction
Get Football Locker Quote

Hockey Lockers

Hockey equipment is among the most challenging to store. Our hockey lockers are built for skates, pads, sticks, and gear with specialized storage and drying features.

  • Reinforced construction for heavy gear
  • Compartments for skates and stick storage
  • Ventilated compartments for pads and helmets
  • Equipment drying features
Get Hockey Locker Quote

Basketball Lockers

Our basketball lockers provide sleek, organized storage for shoes, uniforms, and personal items with a professional, modern appearance.

  • Sleek and organized design
  • Dedicated shoe and uniform storage
  • Personal item compartments
  • Space-efficient layout
Get Basketball Locker Quote

Baseball Lockers

Customized storage for bats, gloves, helmets, and uniforms. Our baseball lockers keep everything organized and accessible.

  • Equipment-specific compartments
  • Uniform and gear organization
  • Easy access and durable construction
Get Baseball Locker Quote

Soccer Lockers

Organized storage for cleats, shin guards, uniforms, and equipment. Our soccer lockers keep everything accessible and professional.

  • Compartments for cleats and gear
  • Uniform hanging and ventilated storage
Get Soccer Locker Quote

Need Lockers for Multiple Sports?

We design complete locker room solutions for multi-sport facilities. Get a free custom design consultation.

Get Free Design Consultation
